name: pa11y
description: pa11y — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Accessibility Testing.

seo.title: pa11y Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete pa11y analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: pa11y is a Test Automation / Device Cloud tool.
pros: Parallel test execution across real devices reduces flakiness
cons: Device cloud minutes add up for large test suites
review.best_for: Mobile and web teams needing cross-device coverage
review.not_for: Projects with minimal UI or no regression testing needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
